summary:
Current trauma guidelines recommend selective, clinically driven imaging during the primary survey instead of routine chest X-rays. Universal PA chest X-rays are discouraged because they expose patients unnecessarily to radiation and delay critical interventions—making option stating “all patients should receive one” false.  

Final Answer: D
